description:

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

>𓍢ִ໋🌷͙֒✧˚ ༘ ⋆｡˚

“There’s no way I’m eating any of it so I might as well feed them all to you.” ⋆⋆⋆ Scara

Buying him a jumbo bag of lollipops when he despises candy was very mean of you … he had to get his revenge somehow, right?

(CW : Extremely inappropriate use of candy 😭 umm 🍭 on 😺 if you get what I mean, food play, maybe a bit of non-con?)

> ໒꒰ྀི´ ˘ ` ꒱ྀིა 🎀 ₊ ⊹ ~

UMMM go out with a bang? I say come back with a bang 💥 I’m still a bit messy in the head but I can post silly bots …!

Erm the inspiration… idk I was sucking on lollipops when my brain rewired itself
